Localization.Description: A suspicious connection is detected, or a connection is denied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A suspicious connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is detected on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is denied on host {event_src.host}
